# ptrender audio fingerprint — schema 1 — g1-basics
#
# NOT a byte golden, and it cannot be one: the DSP uses transcendentals and is built with
# -ffast-math on arm, so gcc/x86-64, MSVC/x86-64 and clang/arm64 disagree on the last bit of
# a reverb tail. These are energy measurements in dBFS, compared with a 1.00 dB tolerance —
# far above the numerical noise between toolchains, far below any regression worth catching.
#
# songFrames is EXACT: it comes from the sequencer, whose arithmetic is IEEE-pinned.
# totalFrames = songFrames + the decay tail, which may shift by a chunk or two.
#
# Regenerate deliberately: delete this file and re-run ptrender.
sr 44100
songFrames 165344
totalFrames 165344
peak -7.49
rms -28.57
sec 0 -25.81
sec 1 -26.84
sec 2 -41.60
